mapper.insert: INSERT INTO msg_invite_tokens (token, label, created_by, max_uses, use_count, expires_at, created_at) VALUES (#{token}, #{label}, #{createdBy}, #{maxUses}, #{useCount}, #{expiresAt}, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE msg_invite_tokens SET use_count = use_count + 1 WHERE token = #{token}
mapper.select: SELECT id, token, label, created_by, max_uses, use_count, expires_at, created_at FROM msg_invite_tokens ORDER BY created_at DESC
